title: Employment and self-employment income - Canada.ca
content:
## Employment and self-employment income
Find out about reporting income related to employment and self-employment , including commission and foreign employment income.

## Types of employment and self-employment income
- Line 10100 – Employment income Report your employment income.
- Line 10120 – Commissions included on line 10100 Report commissions you earned from employment.
- Line 10130 – Wage-loss replacement contributions Report wage-loss replacement contributions.
- Line 10400 – Other employment income Report other employment income like employment income not reported on a T4 slip , research grants, clergy's housing allowance, foreign employment income, royalties, employee profit sharing plans and more.
- Lines 13499 to 14300 – Self-employment income Report self-employment income or loss from a business, a profession, commission, farming or fishing.
- All types of income List of the types of income to report on an income tax and benefit return.

## Forms and publications
- Claiming deductions, credits and expenses
